## Consent / การอนุญาตใช้ผล

- [ ] This case may be summarized anonymously in public reports.
- [ ] Do not use this case in public reports.

## Boundary Reminder / ขอบเขต

Submit public-safe examples only. Do not submit private, medical, financial,
legal, religious-confession, password, API key, or private ELUZA internal data.
